# Name: # Hardware: Seeed XIAO ESP32-S3 - 8 MB Flash / 8 MB PSRAM
# nvs_backup uses custom type 0x41 so ESP-IDF does not auto-init it.
# It is written by the provisioner and used by config.c for NVS recovery.
# fctry      read-only NVS copy (third recovery tier after nvs_backup).
# RX has 128 KB free after ota_1; fctry uses 24 KB of that.
# OTA partitions: 2 x ~3.9 MB (0x3E0000). Verify with `idf.py size` before flashing.
